hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'lake build' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q '^timeout'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: lake build must use timeout 300 prefix. Use: timeout 300 lake build"}}'; else echo '{"continue":true}'; fi; }
ps -eo pid,etimes,comm 2>/dev/null | awk '$3=="lean" && $2>300 {print $1}' | while read -r pid; do kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null; done; echo '{"continue":true}'
